<style id="themeCSS"></style><style id="customCSS">.slds-path__action {display:none} /* hide path completion action button */
.slds-button.slds-button--icon-x-small.slds-button--icon-border-filled {display:none;} /* hide action menus on record list component and related list single component*/
.oneActionsRibbon .slds-button--neutral>a[title="Add Files"] {display: none;} /*hide files record list Add Files button */
.inverseTextColor {color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important;} /* show Login component Register link */
.slds-modal__container {width: 90rem; max-width: 90rem} /* increase modal size */
[data-target-selection-name="sfdc:StandardButton.MUSW__Submission__c.Edit"]  {
    display: none !important;
}
[data-target-selection-name="sfdc:StandardButton.MUSW__Fee__c.Edit"]  {
    display: none !important;
}

/*Hide the New buttons in List views*/
li[data-target-selection-name*="MUSW__Permit2__c.New"],
li[data-target-selection-name*="MUSW__Application2__c.New"],
li[data-target-selection-name*="LACPS_External_License__c.LACPS_New"],
li[data-target-selection-name*="MUSW__Request__c.LACPS_New_Request"] {
  display: none !important;
 
}

/* Hide follow button on External license*/
div[data-target-selection-name="sfdc:StandardButton.LACPS_External_License__c.Follow"] {display:none !important;}
div[data-target-selection-name="sfdc:StandardButton.LACPS_External_License__c.Unfollow"] {display:none !important;}

/*Remove the X button for each Fee in the Cart
button[title="Remove"]{
    display: none;}*/

/* Body rows: hide button column. Note this needs to be updated if the cart columns are changed */
table[clariti-paymentcartfeetables_paymentcartfeetables] tbody c-table-cell:nth-child(6)
{
  display: none !important;
}

/*The menu will be displayed on a non-transparent background*/
.js-top-level-menu-item
{
    background-color: white !important;
}

/*Remove the "Remove" column title above the Fees in the Cart
div[title="Remove"]{
    display: none;}*/

/* Header: hide "Remove" column. Note this needs to be updated if the cart columns are changed */
table[clariti-paymentcartfeetables_paymentcartfeetables] thead th:nth-child(6) {
  display: none;
}

/*Control sizing of modal windows*/
.slds-modal__container{
    max-width: 90vw;
    overflow: auto;
}



.slds-modal__content, .runtime_platform_actionsQuickActionWrapper { overflow: auto; }


.comm-user-profile-menu__login-button
{
    width: 258px;
    height: 46px;
    font-size: 0;
    background: url("https://lacps--uat.sandbox.my.salesforce.com/sfc/dist/version/renditionDownload?rendition=ORIGINAL_Png&versionId=068Ot00000BX5U3&operationContext=DELIVERY&contentId=05TOt00000I5T7O&page=0&d=/a/Ot000001G1HJ/Jz5Zu.j._cLKwVsEC6CqChsT3DAnFtMqmGQ7TwVd6bU&oid=00DD4000000Hvp0&dpt=null&viewId=") !important;
}

.comm-tile-menu__item-banner {
  word-break: normal !important;
  overflow-wrap: break-word;
  white-space: normal;
}

/*Hide Skip to Menu Content*/
/*a.forceSkipLink {
  display: none !important;
}*/

/* Optional */
/*div.chatterActionContainer .slds-icon-utility-add, div.chatterActionContainer button {display: none;} /* hide record banner Follow button */
/*span[title='Following'], .slds-button .slds-icon-utility-check {display: none} /* Hide the Following button on the Record Banner component */

.comm-navigation, .ctaButtons, .ctaBtnOne
/*Increase font size and weight in navbar and CTA buttons*/
{
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
}
/*Allow text wrap in menu*/
.comm-navigation__sub-menu-item a 
{
    text-wrap:wrap !important;
    word-wrap: normal;
   
}




/*Custom notification styling*/
.lacps_notification_bg
{
    background-color: #23579A; color:white;padding: 0.5rem 1rem;font-family: Lato;font-size:14px; border-radius: 4px;
}
.lacps_paragraph
{
  margin-top: 1rem;  
}


/* This is to provide modification on links within footer area */
.lacps_footerBackground
{
    background-color: rgb(35, 87, 154);
    color: white;
    justify-content: space-between;
    margin: 0;
    padding:20px;
    vertical-align: central;
    width: 100%;
}

.site-header {

  z-index: 100;  

}
 
.lacps_footerContentCenter
{
    text-align: center;
}
.header
{

  z-index: 1000 !important;         /* higher than anything else */

}


@media print {
   .page-break-before-footer {
       display: block;
       height: 1px;
       page-break-before: always;
       width: 100%;
	}
}

@media screen and (max-width: 700px) {

  /* Hide LADBS logo on small screens */
  .logoImage {
    display: none !important;
    visibility: hidden !important;
  }

  /* Adjust the Sign in with Angeleno Account button for small screens */
  .comm-user-profile-menu__login-button {
    margin-left: -10px !important;      /* shift slightly left */
    transform: scale(0.95);             /* slightly shrink for better fit */
    width: 250px !important;            /* reasonable width */
    max-width: 90%;                     /* prevent overflow */
    height: 46px;                       /* keep consistent height */

    /* Background adjustments */
    background-size: contain !important;
    background-position: center center !important;
    background-repeat: no-repeat !important;

    /* Remove possible green line edges */
    border: none !important;
    outline: none !important;
    clip-path: inset(1px 0 1px 0);      /* trims 1px top & bottom */
  }

<link rel="stylesheet" id="siteforce_fontStyleSheet" href="/s/sfsites/runtimedownload/fonts.css?lastMod=1765859006000&brandSet=6486d5a5-a550-4208-b542-76842e054085" type="text/css">
<style id="themeCSS"></style><style id="customCSS">.slds-path__action {display:none} /* hide path completion action button */
.slds-button.slds-button--icon-x-small.slds-button--icon-border-filled {display:none;} /* hide action menus on record list component and related list single component*/
.oneActionsRibbon .slds-button--neutral>a[title="Add Files"] {display: none;} /*hide files record list Add Files button */
.inverseTextColor {color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important;} /* show Login component Register link */
.slds-modal__container {width: 90rem; max-width: 90rem} /* increase modal size */
[data-target-selection-name="sfdc:StandardButton.MUSW__Submission__c.Edit"]  {
    display: none !important;
}
[data-target-selection-name="sfdc:StandardButton.MUSW__Fee__c.Edit"]  {
    display: none !important;
}

/*Hide the New buttons in List views*/
li[data-target-selection-name*="MUSW__Permit2__c.New"],
li[data-target-selection-name*="MUSW__Application2__c.New"],
li[data-target-selection-name*="LACPS_External_License__c.LACPS_New"],
li[data-target-selection-name*="MUSW__Request__c.LACPS_New_Request"] {
  display: none !important;
 
}

/* Hide follow button on External license*/
div[data-target-selection-name="sfdc:StandardButton.LACPS_External_License__c.Follow"] {display:none !important;}
div[data-target-selection-name="sfdc:StandardButton.LACPS_External_License__c.Unfollow"] {display:none !important;}

/*Remove the X button for each Fee in the Cart
button[title="Remove"]{
    display: none;}*/

/* Body rows: hide button column. Note this needs to be updated if the cart columns are changed */
table[clariti-paymentcartfeetables_paymentcartfeetables] tbody c-table-cell:nth-child(6)
{
  display: none !important;
}

/*The menu will be displayed on a non-transparent background*/
.js-top-level-menu-item
{
    background-color: white !important;
}

/*Remove the "Remove" column title above the Fees in the Cart
div[title="Remove"]{
    display: none;}*/

/* Header: hide "Remove" column. Note this needs to be updated if the cart columns are changed */
table[clariti-paymentcartfeetables_paymentcartfeetables] thead th:nth-child(6) {
  display: none;
}

/*Control sizing of modal windows*/
.slds-modal__container{
    max-width: 90vw;
    overflow: auto;
}



.slds-modal__content, .runtime_platform_actionsQuickActionWrapper { overflow: auto; }


.comm-user-profile-menu__login-button
{
    width: 258px;
    height: 46px;
    font-size: 0;
    background: url("https://lacps--uat.sandbox.my.salesforce.com/sfc/dist/version/renditionDownload?rendition=ORIGINAL_Png&versionId=068Ot00000BX5U3&operationContext=DELIVERY&contentId=05TOt00000I5T7O&page=0&d=/a/Ot000001G1HJ/Jz5Zu.j._cLKwVsEC6CqChsT3DAnFtMqmGQ7TwVd6bU&oid=00DD4000000Hvp0&dpt=null&viewId=") !important;
}

.comm-tile-menu__item-banner {
  word-break: normal !important;
  overflow-wrap: break-word;
  white-space: normal;
}

/*Hide Skip to Menu Content*/
/*a.forceSkipLink {
  display: none !important;
}*/

/* Optional */
/*div.chatterActionContainer .slds-icon-utility-add, div.chatterActionContainer button {display: none;} /* hide record banner Follow button */
/*span[title='Following'], .slds-button .slds-icon-utility-check {display: none} /* Hide the Following button on the Record Banner component */
/*span[title='Unfollow'], .slds-button .slds-icon-utility-close {display: ''} /* Hide the Unfollow button on the Record Banner component  */

.comm-navigation, .ctaButtons, .ctaBtnOne
/*Increase font size and weight in navbar and CTA buttons*/
{
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
}
/*Allow text wrap in menu*/
.comm-navigation__sub-menu-item a 
{
    text-wrap:wrap !important;
    word-wrap: normal;
   
}




/*Custom notification styling*/
.lacps_notification_bg
{
    background-color: #23579A; color:white;padding: 0.5rem 1rem;font-family: Lato;font-size:14px; border-radius: 4px;
}
.lacps_paragraph
{
  margin-top: 1rem;  
}


/* This is to provide modification on links within footer area */
.lacps_footerBackground
{
    background-color: rgb(35, 87, 154);
    color: white;
    justify-content: space-between;
    margin: 0;
    padding:20px;
    vertical-align: central;
    width: 100%;
}

.site-header {

  z-index: 100;  

}
 
.lacps_footerContentCenter
{
    text-align: center;
}
.header
{

  z-index: 1000 !important;         /* higher than anything else */

}


@media print {
   .page-break-before-footer {
       display: block;
       height: 1px;
       page-break-before: always;
       width: 100%;
	}
}

@media screen and (max-width: 700px) {

  /* Hide LADBS logo on small screens */
  .logoImage {
    display: none !important;
    visibility: hidden !important;
  }

  /* Adjust the Sign in with Angeleno Account button for small screens */
  .comm-user-profile-menu__login-button {
    margin-left: -10px !important;      /* shift slightly left */
    transform: scale(0.95);             /* slightly shrink for better fit */
    width: 250px !important;            /* reasonable width */
    max-width: 90%;                     /* prevent overflow */
    height: 46px;                       /* keep consistent height */

    /* Background adjustments */
    background-size: contain !important;
    background-position: center center !important;
    background-repeat: no-repeat !important;

    /* Remove possible green line edges */
    border: none !important;
    outline: none !important;
    clip-path: inset(1px 0 1px 0);      /* trims 1px top & bottom */
  }

<style id="themeCSS"></style><style id="customCSS">.slds-path__action {display:none} /* hide path completion action button */
.slds-button.slds-button--icon-x-small.slds-button--icon-border-filled {display:none;} /* hide action menus on record list component and related list single component*/
.oneActionsRibbon .slds-button--neutral>a[title="Add Files"] {display: none;} /*hide files record list Add Files button */
.inverseTextColor {color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important;} /* show Login component Register link */
.slds-modal__container {width: 90rem; max-width: 90rem} /* increase modal size */
[data-target-selection-name="sfdc:StandardButton.MUSW__Submission__c.Edit"]  {
    display: none !important;
}
[data-target-selection-name="sfdc:StandardButton.MUSW__Fee__c.Edit"]  {
    display: none !important;
}

/*Hide the New buttons in List views*/
li[data-target-selection-name*="MUSW__Permit2__c.New"],
li[data-target-selection-name*="MUSW__Application2__c.New"],
li[data-target-selection-name*="LACPS_External_License__c.LACPS_New"],
li[data-target-selection-name*="MUSW__Request__c.LACPS_New_Request"] {
  display: none !important;
 
}

/* Hide follow button on External license*/
div[data-target-selection-name="sfdc:StandardButton.LACPS_External_License__c.Follow"] {display:none !important;}
div[data-target-selection-name="sfdc:StandardButton.LACPS_External_License__c.Unfollow"] {display:none !important;}

/*Remove the X button for each Fee in the Cart
button[title="Remove"]{
    display: none;}*/

/* Body rows: hide button column. Note this needs to be updated if the cart columns are changed */
table[clariti-paymentcartfeetables_paymentcartfeetables] tbody c-table-cell:nth-child(6)
{
  display: none !important;
}

/*The menu will be displayed on a non-transparent background*/
.js-top-level-menu-item
{
    background-color: white !important;
}

/*Remove the "Remove" column title above the Fees in the Cart
div[title="Remove"]{
    display: none;}*/

/* Header: hide "Remove" column. Note this needs to be updated if the cart columns are changed */
table[clariti-paymentcartfeetables_paymentcartfeetables] thead th:nth-child(6) {
  display: none;
}

/*Control sizing of modal windows*/
.slds-modal__container{
    max-width: 90vw;
    overflow: auto;
}



.slds-modal__content, .runtime_platform_actionsQuickActionWrapper { overflow: auto; }


.comm-user-profile-menu__login-button
{
    width: 258px;
    height: 46px;
    font-size: 0;
    background: url("https://lacps--uat.sandbox.my.salesforce.com/sfc/dist/version/renditionDownload?rendition=ORIGINAL_Png&versionId=068Ot00000BX5U3&operationContext=DELIVERY&contentId=05TOt00000I5T7O&page=0&d=/a/Ot000001G1HJ/Jz5Zu.j._cLKwVsEC6CqChsT3DAnFtMqmGQ7TwVd6bU&oid=00DD4000000Hvp0&dpt=null&viewId=") !important;
}

.comm-tile-menu__item-banner {
  word-break: normal !important;
  overflow-wrap: break-word;
  white-space: normal;
}

/*Hide Skip to Menu Content*/
/*a.forceSkipLink {
  display: none !important;
}*/

/* Optional */
/*div.chatterActionContainer .slds-icon-utility-add, div.chatterActionContainer button {display: none;} /* hide record banner Follow button */
/*span[title='Following'], .slds-button .slds-icon-utility-check {display: none} /* Hide the Following button on the Record Banner component */
/*span[title='Unfollow'], .slds-button .slds-icon-utility-close {display: ''} /* Hide the Unfollow button on the Record Banner component  */

.comm-navigation, .ctaButtons, .ctaBtnOne
/*Increase font size and weight in navbar and CTA buttons*/
{
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
}
/*Allow text wrap in menu*/
.comm-navigation__sub-menu-item a 
{
    text-wrap:wrap !important;
    word-wrap: normal;
   
}




/*Custom notification styling*/
.lacps_notification_bg
{
    background-color: #23579A; color:white;padding: 0.5rem 1rem;font-family: Lato;font-size:14px; border-radius: 4px;
}
.lacps_paragraph
{
  margin-top: 1rem;  
}


/* This is to provide modification on links within footer area */
.lacps_footerBackground
{
    background-color: rgb(35, 87, 154);
    color: white;
    justify-content: space-between;
    margin: 0;
    padding:20px;
    vertical-align: central;
    width: 100%;
}

.site-header {

  z-index: 100;  

}
 
.lacps_footerContentCenter
{
    text-align: center;
}
.header
{

  z-index: 1000 !important;         /* higher than anything else */

}


@media print {
   .page-break-before-footer {
       display: block;
       height: 1px;
       page-break-before: always;
       width: 100%;
	}
}

@media screen and (max-width: 700px) {

  /* Hide LADBS logo on small screens */
  .logoImage {
    display: none !important;
    visibility: hidden !important;
  }

  /* Adjust the Sign in with Angeleno Account button for small screens */
  .comm-user-profile-menu__login-button {
    margin-left: -10px !important;      /* shift slightly left */
    transform: scale(0.95);             /* slightly shrink for better fit */
    width: 250px !important;            /* reasonable width */
    max-width: 90%;                     /* prevent overflow */
    height: 46px;                       /* keep consistent height */

    /* Background adjustments */
    background-size: contain !important;
    background-position: center center !important;
    background-repeat: no-repeat !important;

    /* Remove possible green line edges */
    border: none !important;
    outline: none !important;
    clip-path: inset(1px 0 1px 0);      /* trims 1px top & bottom */
  }

<style id="themeCSS"></style><style id="customCSS">.slds-path__action {display:none} /* hide path completion action button */
.slds-button.slds-button--icon-x-small.slds-button--icon-border-filled {display:none;} /* hide action menus on record list component and related list single component*/
.oneActionsRibbon .slds-button--neutral>a[title="Add Files"] {display: none;} /*hide files record list Add Files button */
.inverseTextColor {color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important;} /* show Login component Register link */
.slds-modal__container {width: 90rem; max-width: 90rem} /* increase modal size */
[data-target-selection-name="sfdc:StandardButton.MUSW__Submission__c.Edit"]  {
    display: none !important;
}
[data-target-selection-name="sfdc:StandardButton.MUSW__Fee__c.Edit"]  {
    display: none !important;
}

/*Hide the New buttons in List views*/
li[data-target-selection-name*="MUSW__Permit2__c.New"],
li[data-target-selection-name*="MUSW__Application2__c.New"],
li[data-target-selection-name*="LACPS_External_License__c.LACPS_New"],
li[data-target-selection-name*="MUSW__Request__c.LACPS_New_Request"] {
  display: none !important;
 
}

/* Hide follow button on External license*/
div[data-target-selection-name="sfdc:StandardButton.LACPS_External_License__c.Follow"] {display:none !important;}
div[data-target-selection-name="sfdc:StandardButton.LACPS_External_License__c.Unfollow"] {display:none !important;}

/*Remove the X button for each Fee in the Cart
button[title="Remove"]{
    display: none;}*/

/* Body rows: hide button column. Note this needs to be updated if the cart columns are changed */
table[clariti-paymentcartfeetables_paymentcartfeetables] tbody c-table-cell:nth-child(6)
{
  display: none !important;
}

/*The menu will be displayed on a non-transparent background*/
.js-top-level-menu-item
{
    background-color: white !important;
}

/*Remove the "Remove" column title above the Fees in the Cart
div[title="Remove"]{
    display: none;}*/

/* Header: hide "Remove" column. Note this needs to be updated if the cart columns are changed */
table[clariti-paymentcartfeetables_paymentcartfeetables] thead th:nth-child(6) {
  display: none;
}

/*Control sizing of modal windows*/
.slds-modal__container{
    max-width: 90vw;
    overflow: auto;
}



.slds-modal__content, .runtime_platform_actionsQuickActionWrapper { overflow: auto; }


.comm-user-profile-menu__login-button
{
    width: 258px;
    height: 46px;
    font-size: 0;
    background: url("https://lacps--uat.sandbox.my.salesforce.com/sfc/dist/version/renditionDownload?rendition=ORIGINAL_Png&versionId=068Ot00000BX5U3&operationContext=DELIVERY&contentId=05TOt00000I5T7O&page=0&d=/a/Ot000001G1HJ/Jz5Zu.j._cLKwVsEC6CqChsT3DAnFtMqmGQ7TwVd6bU&oid=00DD4000000Hvp0&dpt=null&viewId=") !important;
}

.comm-tile-menu__item-banner {
  word-break: normal !important;
  overflow-wrap: break-word;
  white-space: normal;
}

/*Hide Skip to Menu Content*/
/*a.forceSkipLink {
  display: none !important;
}*/

/* Optional */
/*div.chatterActionContainer .slds-icon-utility-add, div.chatterActionContainer button {display: none;} /* hide record banner Follow button */
/*span[title='Following'], .slds-button .slds-icon-utility-check {display: none} /* Hide the Following button on the Record Banner component */
/*span[title='Unfollow'], .slds-button .slds-icon-utility-close {display: ''} /* Hide the Unfollow button on the Record Banner component  */

.comm-navigation, .ctaButtons, .ctaBtnOne
/*Increase font size and weight in navbar and CTA buttons*/
{
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
}
/*Allow text wrap in menu*/
.comm-navigation__sub-menu-item a 
{
    text-wrap:wrap !important;
    word-wrap: normal;
   
}




/*Custom notification styling*/
.lacps_notification_bg
{
    background-color: #23579A; color:white;padding: 0.5rem 1rem;font-family: Lato;font-size:14px; border-radius: 4px;
}
.lacps_paragraph
{
  margin-top: 1rem;  
}


/* This is to provide modification on links within footer area */
.lacps_footerBackground
{
    background-color: rgb(35, 87, 154);
    color: white;
    justify-content: space-between;
    margin: 0;
    padding:20px;
    vertical-align: central;
    width: 100%;
}

.site-header {

  z-index: 100;  

}
 
.lacps_footerContentCenter
{
    text-align: center;
}
.header
{

  z-index: 1000 !important;         /* higher than anything else */

}


@media print {
   .page-break-before-footer {
       display: block;
       height: 1px;
       page-break-before: always;
       width: 100%;
	}
}

@media screen and (max-width: 700px) {

  /* Hide LADBS logo on small screens */
  .logoImage {
    display: none !important;
    visibility: hidden !important;
  }

  /* Adjust the Sign in with Angeleno Account button for small screens */
  .comm-user-profile-menu__login-button {
    margin-left: -10px !important;      /* shift slightly left */
    transform: scale(0.95);             /* slightly shrink for better fit */
    width: 250px !important;            /* reasonable width */
    max-width: 90%;                     /* prevent overflow */
    height: 46px;                       /* keep consistent height */

    /* Background adjustments */
    background-size: contain !important;
    background-position: center center !important;
    background-repeat: no-repeat !important;

    /* Remove possible green line edges */
    border: none !important;
    outline: none !important;
    clip-path: inset(1px 0 1px 0);      /* trims 1px top & bottom */
  }
